prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别约为33468→37386→42697→51923→58084名，呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约24616名；2025年基准位次约58084名，较2024年后移约6161名，后移幅度有所扩大；该校在广东省物理类招生计划：2021年70人、2022年70人、2023年83人、2024年85人、2025年96人，逐年递增；2026年计划126人，较2025年扩招30人（增幅约31.25%），扩招幅度显著，对竞争格局产生较大影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 广西大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第94位持续上升至2026年第86位，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力和认可度在增强；近年无明显负面舆情事件；抖音学校热度总排名第25（较热），综合热度约183万，短视频平台关注度处于中等偏上水平；未见投档线异常或断档记录，报考心理预期较为平稳；第五轮学科评估中广西大学无A-及以上学科记录，但作为综合性大学，在工科、农林等领域有传统优势，对相关专业考生仍具一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校主要招生专业中，电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信为高热推荐，计算机类为推荐，这些热门专业有助于吸引高分考生；广东省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年增加约1.58万人（+3.59%），考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；广西大学位于广西南宁，与广东相邻，文化相近、交通便利，对广东考生有天然的地缘吸引力；该校在广东的招生计划占比逐年提升，反映对广东生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招31.25%、学校排名稳步上升、抖音热度较热、广东考生规模扩大等因素：扩招是位次后移的主导因素，但学校排名持续提升和热度上升部分缓和了竞争加剧的程度。预测2026年物理类最低位次约68775名，区间68275–69275名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间68275–69275名以内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如68000名以内）可重点冲刺电气工程及其自动化、计算机科学与技术等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（如69000名以外）建议以二档的集成电路、车辆工程、能源与动力工程为核心，三档的土木工程、会计学作为稳妥保底。注意生化环材类专业社会热度偏低，报考时需结合个人兴趣和职业规划综合判断。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 33468 → 37386 → 42697 → 51923 → 58084, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 24616 positions over the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 58084, a backward shift of about 6161 positions compared to 2024, with an expanded magnitude of backward shift; the university's enrollment plan in Guangdong for Physics Category: 70 in 2021, 70 in 2022, 83 in 2023, 85 in 2024, 96 in 2025, increasing year by year; the 2026 plan is 126, an expansion of 30 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 31.25%), a significant expansion that greatly impacts the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guangxi University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily risen from 94th in 2021 to 86th in 2026, reflecting an enhancement in comprehensive strength and recognition; there have been no significant negative public opinion incidents in recent years; the university's overall popularity on Douyin ranks 25th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.83 million, indicating a moderately high level of attention on short video platforms; no abnormal or gap records in admission lines have been observed, and the psychological expectations for applications are relatively stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Guangxi University has no A- or above disciplines, but as a comprehensive university, it has traditional advantages in fields such as engineering, agriculture, and forestry, still attracting some candidates for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the university's main enrollment majors, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication are highly recommended, and Computer Science is recommended; these popular majors help attract high-scoring candidates; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong is about 456,000, an increase of about 15,800 compared to 2025 (+3.59%), expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition; Guangxi University is located in Nanning, Guangxi, adjacent to Guangdong, with similar culture and convenient transportation, naturally attracting Guangdong candidates geographically; the proportion of the university's enrollment plan in Guangdong has been increasing year by year, reflecting its emphasis on Guangdong students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant 31.25% expansion in 2026, the steady rise in university ranking, relatively hot Douyin popularity, and the expansion of the Guangdong candidate pool: the expansion is the dominant factor for the backward shift in rankings, but the continuous improvement in university ranking and increased popularity partially mitigate the intensified competition. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 68775, with a range of 68275–69275.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 68275–69275, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 68000), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science and Technology; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 69000), it is recommended to take Tier 2 majors such as Integrated Circuit Design, Vehicle Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering as the core, and Tier 3 majors like Civil Engineering, Accounting as a stable safety net. Note that majors in biology, chemistry, environment, and materials have relatively low social popularity; when applying, you need to combine personal interests and career plans for a comprehensive judgment.
